name: io.github.agiletec-inc/airis-mcp-gateway
title: AIRIS MCP Gateway
description: Docker-based MCP multiplexer that aggregates 60+ tools behind 7 meta-tools (airis-find, airis-exec, airis-schema, etc.), reducing context tokens by 97% via progressive disclosure. Supports lazy loading, idle-kill, circuit breaker, and auto-enable of MCP servers.
